# SpatialAudioDebug.DisplayDebugInfo property

Displays key spatial-audio diagnostics as an on-screen overlay every update cycle while within the radius of the source.

Keys: `Distance`, `VolumeDbTarget`, `LowpassCutoff`, `ReverbRoomSize`, `WallCount`

```csharp
public bool DisplayDebugInfo { get; set; }
```
